title: Slovakian Smoky Pudding Stew
description: A hearty and flavorful stew made with smoky pudding, inspired by traditional Slovakian cuisine. Rich and comforting, this dish is perfect for a chilly evening.

ingredients.name: smoky pudding
ingredients.notes: available in most international grocery stores

instructions: Heat 2 cups of water in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the smoky pudding, black one pot, and spicy slovakian potatoes to the pot.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 20 minutes.
Add the chopped onion, minced garlic, and caraway seeds to the pot.
Continue to simmer for an additional 10 minutes, or until the pudding is cooked through.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
Enjoy your delicious Slovakian smoky pudding stew!
